assessment.note: He links being less present to not knowing what needed to change after the promotion decision, which is a strong disengagement signal; also reveals a clarity gap worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Needed to change
new_queue.name: When you say 'what needed to change' — what felt unclear to you?
new_queue.description: Clarifies the specific expectations or signals he felt he was missing after the decision.

new_queue.label: Decision meaning
new_queue.name: What did you take away from the conversation about the promotion decision?
new_queue.description: Finds out what feedback he actually heard and believed, without assuming he received it clearly.

new_queue.label: Path forward
new_queue.name: What path forward feels real to you from here?
new_queue.description: Tests whether he sees a concrete route ahead or is still waiting for one to emerge.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help this feel more workable over the next couple of weeks?
new_queue.description: Closes by moving toward concrete support or adjustments without opening a new thread.
